data_coverage_summary: ComplyAdvantage API has public documentation that indicates regulatory screening and compliance workflows across watchlist matches, cases, alerts, entities. Public API docs for screening/monitoring.
buyer_guidance: Use this API family for screening, monitoring, and compliance-review workflows rather than telemetry or physical asset integration. Complyadvantage should be treated as a rest api surface for regulatory screening and compliance workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for ComplyAdvantage API indicates Public API docs for screening/monitoring. The documented surface aligns with regulatory screening and compliance workflows and covers watchlist matches, cases, alerts, entities. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates compliance screening and monitoring workflows for entities, alerts, cases, and ongoing review processes.
data_points: Monitoring jobs and compliance workflow outputs

ingest_considerations: The public source for ComplyAdvantage API is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as regulatory screening and compliance workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
